description: Shared test cases for the ~/.mthds/config dotenv dialect, pinned by docs/specs/mthds-config-file.md. The canonical copy lives at conformance/tests/mthds/fixtures/config_dialect_cases.json; mthds-python (tests/fixtures/config_dialect_cases.json) and mthds-js (tests/fixtures/config-dialect-cases.json) vendor byte-identical copies, gated by conformance/scripts/check-config-dialect-fixture.py. Edit the canonical copy first, then propagate.

parse_cases.name: empty_file
parse_cases.description: An empty file parses to an empty mapping.

parse_cases.name: basic_pair
parse_cases.description: A single KEY=value line parses to one entry.

parse_cases.name: no_trailing_newline
parse_cases.description: A final line without a trailing newline still parses.

parse_cases.name: first_equals_wins
parse_cases.description: Only the first = splits key from value; later = signs are part of the value.

parse_cases.name: base64_padding_preserved
parse_cases.description: Base64 == padding at the end of a value survives (first-=-wins).

parse_cases.name: comment_lines_skipped
parse_cases.description: Whole-line # comments are skipped, including when indented.

parse_cases.name: blank_lines_skipped
parse_cases.description: Empty and whitespace-only lines are skipped.

parse_cases.name: whitespace_trimmed
parse_cases.description: Whitespace around the key and around the value is trimmed.

parse_cases.name: hash_in_value_preserved
parse_cases.description: A # after the = is part of the value — there are no inline comments.

parse_cases.name: quotes_are_literal
parse_cases.description: Quotes are ordinary value characters, not delimiters — no dequoting.

parse_cases.name: line_without_equals_skipped
parse_cases.description: A non-empty, non-comment line with no = is skipped.
parse_cases.input:
this line has no equals sign
MTHDS_RUNNER=api

parse_cases.name: duplicate_key_last_wins
parse_cases.description: A duplicate key overwrites the earlier occurrence.

parse_cases.name: unknown_keys_parsed
parse_cases.description: Keys a given client does not recognize (e.g. the mthds-js-only telemetry/upgrade keys) still parse at the dialect level.

parse_cases.name: crlf_tolerated
parse_cases.description: \r\n line endings are tolerated: the trailing \r is removed by trimming.

parse_cases.name: lone_cr_not_a_separator
parse_cases.description: A lone \r (classic-Mac line ending) is NOT a line separator: lines split on \n only, so the \r and everything after it stay inside the value.

parse_cases.name: empty_value
parse_cases.description: KEY= with nothing after it parses to an empty-string value.

serialize_cases.name: single_entry
serialize_cases.description: One entry serializes to one KEY=value line with a trailing newline.

serialize_cases.name: insertion_order_preserved
serialize_cases.description: Entries are written in insertion order, joined by \n, with a single trailing newline.

serialize_cases.name: equals_in_value_unquoted
serialize_cases.description: A value containing = (base64 padding) is written literally, with no quoting.

serialize_cases.name: empty_entries
serialize_cases.description: An empty mapping serializes to a single newline (join of nothing plus the trailing newline).

rewrite_cases.name: comments_and_blanks_dropped
rewrite_cases.description: A parse-then-serialize rewrite (what a programmatic set does) keeps only key=value pairs: comments and blank lines are lost.
rewrite_cases.input:
# top comment

MTHDS_RUNNER=api

# trailing comment
MTHDS_API_KEY=key-123

rewrite_cases.name: unknown_keys_survive_rewrite
rewrite_cases.description: Unrecognized keys pass through a rewrite untouched — one client's write preserves the other client's keys.

rewrite_cases.name: whitespace_and_duplicates_normalized
rewrite_cases.description: A rewrite trims padding around keys/values and collapses duplicate keys to the last value.
